title: rosa coriifolia subvar. cerasifera
intro: Rosa coriifolia subvar. cerasifera, also known as the Chinese cherry rose or wild cherry rose, is a subvariety of the Rosa coriifolia plant species, which is a type of wild rose native to China and other parts of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rosa coriifolia subvar. cerasifera include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as tea, decoctions, and infusions, which are used to treat various ailments in traditional Chinese medicine.
